name: 工作-家庭边界
description: 用于表达工作与家庭角色、边界渗透、角色冲突、弹性工作和工作-家庭协商。

clusters.meaning: 工作与家庭责任之间的冲突和压力

expressions.note: 领域核心术语，适合和 mediate/address/alleviate 搭配记忆。
expressions.example: FWAs may alleviate work-family conflict.

expressions.en: conflicting responsibilities from work and family domains
expressions.note: 比 work-family conflict 更展开，适合机制解释句。
expressions.example: Policies help accommodate conflicting responsibilities from work and family domains.

expressions.note: 比 work and family pressure 更理论化，能接 work-family conflict。
expressions.example: Role pressures from both domains produce conflict.

expressions.note: 适合说明角色要求冲突，语气比 conflict 更抽象。
expressions.example: Work and family demands can be mutually incompatible.

expressions.note: 比 balance responsibilities 更有政策含义。
expressions.example: Flexible work can accommodate conflicting responsibilities.

clusters.meaning: 工作-家庭边界及其渗透方向

expressions.note: 比 work and family areas 更自然，适合标题和理论段。
expressions.example: Couples negotiate work-family spheres over time.

expressions.note: 理论术语，适合说明弹性工作让哪个领域侵入哪个领域。
expressions.example: FWAs alter work-family border permeability.

expressions.note: 比 general permeability 更精确，强调渗透方向。
expressions.example: Flexibility can increase family-to-work permeability.

expressions.note: 和 family-to-work 成对，适合说明男女使用弹性工作的不同方向。
expressions.example: Telework may increase work-to-family permeability.

expressions.en: distinguish the direction of work-family permeability
expressions.note: 不是只说冲突增加，而是解释工作侵入家庭还是家庭侵入工作。
expressions.example: The analysis distinguishes the direction of work-family permeability.

clusters.meaning: 弹性工作、职场规范和使用动机

expressions.note: 用来解释 why availability does not translate into use。
expressions.example: Flexibility stigma may suppress policy take-up.

expressions.note: 适合解释男性或照护者使用弹性工作为何受罚。
expressions.example: FWA use can violate the ideal-worker norm.

expressions.note: 把长工时文化写成制度/文化规范，而不是个人偏好。
expressions.example: The overwork norm depresses fertility intentions.

expressions.note: 用于说明政策工具是否真正被用于照护和家庭目的。
expressions.example: Workers use flexibility in response to family needs.

expressions.en: prioritize the work domain over the family domain
expressions.note: 比 value work more 更正式，适合解释边界渗透方向。
expressions.example: Some workers prioritize the work domain over the family domain.

clusters.meaning: 工作者、照护者和父母角色转换

expressions.en: X enables individuals to better manage work and family.
expressions.note: 常见但比 balance work and family 更完整，适合背景段。
expressions.example: Flexible work enables parents to better manage work and family.

expressions.note: 比 help parents 更理论化，强调生命历程转变。
expressions.example: Flexible work may facilitate role transitions into parenthood.

expressions.note: work-family 机制之一，适合解释 strain-based conflict。
expressions.example: The policy may reduce spillover of negative emotions.

expressions.en: dual role as workers and caregivers
expressions.note: 比 work and family roles 更具体，适合母职/父职讨论。
expressions.example: Mothers navigate a dual role as workers and caregivers.

expressions.note: 用于区分公共领域性别平等和家庭制度中的滞后。
expressions.example: Gender inequity persists in family-oriented institutions.
